headline: Assessing Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Valuation After The Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Recent performance context for Intuitive Surgical Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) has been under pressure recently, with the stock down about 10% over the past month and about 15% over the past 3 months. This has prompted investors to reassess expectations. See our latest analysis for Intuitive Surgical. Beyond the recent pullback, the stock has also declined about 25% based on the year to date share price return, even though the 3 year and 5 year total shareholder returns remain positive. If you...
